name: Chocolate-Blueberry Dessert Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cookie crumbs and margarine, stirring well.
2. Press the mixture into the bottom of an ungreased 9-inch square pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
4. Beat the egg whites (at room temperature) until foamy.
5. Gradually add powdered sugar, beating until blended.
6. Add cream cheese and beat until smooth.
7. Spread the mixture evenly over the crust.
8. Top with pie filling and sprinkle with 3/4 cup pecans.
9. Beat whipping cream at high speed until foamy.
10. Add sugar and vanilla, and beat until soft peaks form.
11. Spread evenly over the pie filling.
12. Combine chocolate chips and milk in a small saucepan; cook over low heat until chocolate melts, stirring constantly.
13. Drizzle the chocolate mixture over the whipped cream.
14. Chill several hours.
Note: Cherry pie filling can be substituted for the blueberry.
